printed.name: Chest Lift with Magic Circle
printed.setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, knees bent, legs parallel, feet flat on Mat, holding one Magic Circle between knees, holding other Magic Circle between hands, arms straight and perpendicular

movement.exhale: Lift head and chest, press legs and arms together

cues: Keep head aligned with spine when lifting into spinal flexion
Maintain tension in both circles, increase tension when lifting
